title: chore(deps): update dependency react-test-renderer to v15.6.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| react-test-renderer | devDependencies | patch | `15.6.1` -> `15.6.2` | [homepage](https://reactjs.org/), [source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>facebook/react</summary>

### [`v15.6.2`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1562-September-25-2017)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/compare/v15.6.1...v15.6.2)

##### All Packages

-   Switch from BSD + Patents to MIT license

##### React DOM

-   Fix a bug where modifying `document.documentMode` would trigger IE detection in other browsers, breaking change events. ([@​aweary](https://renovatebot.com/gh/aweary) in [#​10032](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/10032))
-   CSS Columns are treated as unitless numbers. ([@​aweary](https://renovatebot.com/gh/aweary) in [#​10115](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/10115))
-   Fix bug in QtWebKit when wrapping synthetic events in proxies. ([@​walrusfruitcake](https://renovatebot.com/gh/walrusfruitcake) in [#​10115](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/10011))
-   Prevent event handlers from receiving extra argument in development. ([@​aweary](https://renovatebot.com/gh/aweary) in [#​10115](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/8363))
-   Fix cases where `onChange` would not fire with `defaultChecked` on radio inputs. ([@​jquense](https://renovatebot.com/gh/jquense) in [#​10156](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/10156))
-   Add support for `controlList` attribute to DOM property whitelist ([@​nhunzaker](https://renovatebot.com/gh/nhunzaker) in [#​9940](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/9940))
-   Fix a bug where creating an element with a ref in a constructor did not throw an error in development. ([@​iansu](https://renovatebot.com/gh/iansu) in [#​10025](https://renovatebot.com/gh/facebook/react/pull/10025))

</details>
